title: arenaria trinervia var. pentandra
intro: Arenaria trinervia var. pentandra is a plant species, also known as sandwort, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Arenaria trinervia var. pentandra include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and respiratory problems.
